title: Critical RCE Vulnerability — OpenSSL CVE-2024-5678

attackChain.description: CWPP agent detected outdated OpenSSL 3.0.8 on primary database server during routine vulnerability scan.
CVE-2024-5678 (CVSS 9.8): Buffer overflow in OpenSSL allowing remote code execution via crafted TLS handshake.
Database server handles TLS connections from application tier. Exploitation would grant RCE as the database service user.
No active exploitation detected. Vulnerability is exploitable but requires network access to the database TLS port.

note: EXAMPLE — fixture data for demo mode.
